exp: This post discusses President Kiir's decrees from early 2026, appearing to be factual reporting on political appointments and government actions. Contains no hate speech or targeting of groups.

t:
please i work really hard on my analyses and I write them up on Sudan literally in the same day developments occur so it does suck when people dont put in the time to read them or at least share them 

if that keeps happening I am going to have to stop writing them because this is not something I am
exp: This appears to be personal frustration from an analyst about their work not being read or shared. While expressing annoyance, it contains no hate speech targeting any group or identity.

t:
🔴 BREAKING NEWS 

Vice President Taban Deng Gai has blamed rising insecurity and economic disruption in Unity State and Ruweng on 26 illegal checkpoints.

Speaking during funeral prayers for victims of the March 1 Abiemnom incident, he said the roadblocks continue to operate despite government order
exp: This post reports on Vice President Taban Deng Gai's comments about insecurity and illegal checkpoints in Unity State. It's straightforward news reporting without any hate speech content.

t:
